initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN results.grid != 1 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_not_first_grid
FROM results
JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.surname = 'Hamilton' 
  AND races.year >= 2010;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN results.grid != 1 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM results
JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
WHERE drivers.surname = 'Hamilton'
  AND races.year >= 2010;

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) 
                         FROM results r
                         JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
                         JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
                         WHERE d.surname = 'Hamilton' AND ra.year >= 2010) AS percentage_not_first_grid
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE d.surname = 'Hamilton' AND ra.year >= 2010 AND r.grid != 1;

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_races,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN results.grid != 1 THEN 1 END) AS not_first_grid_races,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN results.grid != 1 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_not_first_grid
FROM results
JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.surname = 'Hamilton'
  AND races.year >= 2010;

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_races,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN results.grid != 1 THEN 1 END) AS not_first_grid_races,
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN results.grid != 1 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_not_first_grid
FROM results
JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.surname = 'Hamilton'
  AND races.year >= 2010;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN results.grid != 1 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_not_first_grid
FROM results
JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.surname = 'Hamilton' 
  AND races.year >= 2010;

candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_races,
    SUM(CASE WHEN results.grid != 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS not_first_grid_races,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN results.grid != 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_not_first_grid
FROM results
JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
WHERE drivers.surname = 'Hamilton'
  AND races.year >= 2010;
